rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 мч., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. мч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар мч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і мч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний мч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря мч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. мч.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – мч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – Рим. 106 зач.; 11, 13-24. Єв. – Мт. 43 зач.; 11, 27-30.

troparion_en.text: Your holy martyr Leontius and his companions, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion_en.text: You confounded the wicked plans of tyrants / and exposed the godless worship of the pagan Greeks. / You illumined all mankind with the knowledge of God by your teachings of true piety, divinely-wise martyr. / Therefore, Leontius, we lovingly honor your memory.

matched_oca_saint: Martyrs Leontius, Hypatius, and Theodulus at Tripoli in Syria

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Leontius, Hypatius, and Theodulus at Tripoli in Syria

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Leontius and his companions, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text: You confounded the wicked plans of tyrants / and exposed the godless worship of the pagan Greeks. / You illumined all mankind with the knowledge of God by your teachings of true piety, divinely-wise martyr. / Therefore, Leontius, we lovingly honor your memory.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Leontius of the Kiev Far Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Leontius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Leontius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: “Bogolyubov” Icon of the Mother of God

kontakion.text:
Today the Virgin appears before her Son,  / stretching out her hands toward Him;  / the Holy Prince Andrew 
rejoices,  / and the land of Russia celebrates with him, /  for the Theotokos prays unceasingly to God for us.
